value_chain_position: Creative and document intelligence platform layer — sells the dominant creative toolchain (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere, Firefly generative AI) and document workflow OS (Acrobat/PDF) that underlies all professional content creation and AI-augmented design.
relative_comps: Adobe is the incumbent creative monopoly with exceptional FCF conversion (42% FCF margin) but growth has slowed to ~11% YoY as generative AI competitors (Canva, Figma, Midjourney) erode the consumer/SMB edge. Enterprise and PDF/document intelligence remain sticky, and Firefly is a genuine AI moat in licensed training data. At a $96B cap it trades at a discount to pure-cloud SaaS on revenue multiple, reflecting the maturing growth trajectory; the ai_infrastructure tag reflects Firefly/AXON-equivalent inference monetization embedded in Creative Cloud.
